description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized airplane with a predominantly green and black color scheme, featuring prominent branding from NVIDIA, Ryzen, and other technology companies. The aircraft has a sleek, angular fuselage with two long, narrow wings that extend outward and slightly downward, each adorned with large, bold text. The cockpit is situated at the front and appears to be enclosed, with visible canopy framing and a streamlined design. The tail section is compact, with twin vertical stabilizers and a central exhaust or engine outlet. The airplane's surface is glossy and smooth, with various decals and sponsor logos adding to its high-tech, racing-inspired appearance.
description: A sleek, green and black racing-style airplane with bold tech branding, angular wings, and a compact twin-tail design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, enclosed cockpit, and the wide, downward-angled wings with visible branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, prominent wing structure, and visible landing gear components beneath the body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, central engine outlet, and the full span of the wings with detailed surface graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side's branding and structural details, including the landing gear and wing attachments.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, straight wings featuring slight downward anhedral and prominent wingtip extensions.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a central horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
